title: Ticket 06 - Workstation protection need
description: Dummy data for ticket 06 - Workstation protection need (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 06 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply the training company's workstation protection need safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand the workstation protection need in the training company and implement it cleanly in daily work.

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
